title: viscum laxum subsp. abietis
intro: Viscum laxum subsp. abietis, also known as European mistletoe, is a plant that grows on various tree species and is characterized by its small, white flowers and red berries. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and increase the production of natural killer cells. The health benefits of European mistletoe include its potential to fight cancer, reduce inflammation, and improve overall immune function. European mistletoe is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of tinctures, teas, or dried extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
